title: Supplementary data for "Scalable eQTL mapping using single-nucleus RNA-sequencing of recombined gametes from a small number of individuals"
author: Parker, Matthew
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We developed a rapid expression quantitative trait locus analysis approach using single cell or nucleus RNA sequencing (snRNAseq) of gametes from a small number of heterozygous individuals. This archive contains supplementary datasets for the paper "Scalable eQTL mapping using single-nucleus RNA-sequencing of recombined gametes from a small number of individuals" in excel spreadsheet format.
steps_raw: We developed a rapid expression quantitative trait locus analysis approach using single cell or nucleus RNA sequencing (snRNAseq) of gametes from a small number of heterozygous individuals. This archive contains supplementary datasets for the paper "Scalable eQTL mapping using single-nucleus RNA-sequencing of recombined gametes from a small number of individuals" in excel spreadsheet format.
